Package de.uka.ilkd.key.smt

Class SMTProblem

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.SMTProblem
public class SMTProblem extends Object
Represents a problem that can be passed to a solver. This class was introduced because the SMT module must handle both goals and terms.
Each SMTProblem is related to a set of solvers that are used to solve this problem.

  • Method Details

    • createSMTProblems

      public static Collection<SMTProblem> createSMTProblems(Proof proof)
      Creates out of a proof object several SMT problems. For each open goal a new SMT problem is created.

    • getTerm

      public Term getTerm()
      Returns the term that is related to this problem. If the problem was initialized with a goal, the goal is transformed to the term that can be accessed by this method.

    • getSolvers

      public Collection<SMTSolver> getSolvers()
      Returns the solvers that are related to the problem

    • getGoal

      public Goal getGoal()

    • getNode

      public Node getNode()

    • getSequent

      public Sequent getSequent()

    • getFinalResult

      public SMTSolverResult getFinalResult()
      Returns the result of the problem. If more than one solver have been applied on the problem it computes the result from the results of the solvers. In case that one solver returned a positive result (valid) and another one a negative result (falsifiable) an excpetion is thrown.

    • getSuccessfulSolver

      public SMTSolver getSuccessfulSolver()
      Returns:
      the solver that finished this problem

    • getName

      public String getName()

    • sequentToTerm

      public static Term sequentToTerm(Sequent s, Services services)
